│
└── fyp-backend/
    ├── firebase.json
    ├── firestore.rules                             ← Security rules (with rate_limits explicit deny)
    ├── firestore.indexes.json                      ← Composite indexes: friend_requests, shared_inbox, custom_words, user_search, quiz_attempts
    ├── .firebaserc
    └── functions/
        ├── package.json
        ├── package-lock.json
        ├── tsconfig.json
        ├── tsconfig.dev.json
        ├── .eslintrc.js
        └── src/
            └── index.ts                            ← Cloud Functions: getSpeechToken, translateText(s),
                                                    │  generateLearningContent, detectLanguage,
                                                    │  awardQuizCoins (anti-cheat transaction),
                                                    │  spendCoins, sendChatNotification,
                                                    │  sendFriendRequestNotification,
                                                    │  sendSharedInboxNotification,
                                                    │  pruneStaleTokens, pruneStaleRateLimits
